title: Rabbit's Soulslike RPG
description: A modpack dedicated to the most interesting medieval weapons and structures. Sprinkled in with an amazing combat overhaul, plenty of bosses, and visuals.
body:
**This modpack was especially made for the Minecraft Veyros server.**

A modpack designed to recreate the feeling and combat of soulslike games. This modpack also includes a plethra of medieval themed weapons, armors, and structures.

**A basic rundown of the features:**
- New combat system (Epic Fight)
- Skill tree
- New world generation
- Nifty ships
- Over 10+ different structure mods
- New bosses and mobs
- Enchanting system overhaul
- Better advancements
- Farmer's delight
- Dyanmic lighting
- Shaders
- Keep some inventory
- Miscellaneous details (inentory flourishes, client-sided looting, status bar effects, etc)
- Waystones
- Shoulder surfing reloaded (for better 3rd person)
- Xaero's minimap
- Sound physics remastered
- Medieval themed resourcepacks
- And much more..

**This mod includes plenty of optimization mods, so that all players, regardless of pc specs can enjoy a somewhat decent experience.**
